name: toast
title: Toast
description: Imperative toast notification system. Use toast.success()/error()/warning()/info() to show toasts. Place <ToastContainer /> once at the app root.

consumption.typeImport: import type { ToastContainerProps, ToastData, ToastOptions, ToastIntent, ToastPosition } from '@compomo/ui';

internalDependencies.note: Used internally by Toast. No action needed — it's bundled in @compomo/ui.
Used internally by Toast. No action needed — it's bundled in @compomo/ui.

consumption.notes: Place <ToastContainer /> once at app root. Then call toast.success("Done!") anywhere.
